en_title: Stellar Blade: Blood Rain Dev Comments on Launch Platform Plans
cn_title: 《剑星：血雨》或跨平台首发，开发商称尚未决定
subtitle: 平台未定，但野心不小
opus_summary: 《剑星：血雨》在夏日游戏节公布，但首发平台未定。开发商Shift Up将自行发行，CEO金亨泰暗示可能多平台。同时，微软新CEO阿莎·夏尔玛指出AI热潮导致内存短缺，硬件成本上涨2.75倍，下一代主机可能面临高价挑战。

paragraphs.en: One of the biggest announcements coming out of Summer Game Fest 2026 was Stellar Blade: Blood Rain , the sequel to Shift Up’s action hit Stellar Blade . But while we got an eye-catching debut trailer showing off a new protagonist, the platforms Blood Rain will launch on remain unconfirmed.
paragraphs.cn: 2026年夏日游戏节上最重磅的发布之一便是《剑星：血雨》(Stellar Blade: Blood Rain)，这是Shift Up动作大作《剑星》的续作。虽然我们看到了引人注目的首支预告片，展示了新主角，但《血雨》将登陆哪些平台仍未确认。

paragraphs.en: There’s particular interest in the day-one platforms for Blood Rain because Stellar Blade was published by Sony Interactive Entertainment as a PlayStation 5 exclusive in 2024. A PC version followed a year later, but so far there’s no Xbox Series X and S version.
paragraphs.cn: 人们对《血雨》的首发平台格外关注，因为《剑星》在2024年由索尼互动娱乐发行，是PS5独占游戏。一年后推出了PC版，但至今没有Xbox Series X|S版本。

paragraphs.en: Shift Up has confirmed it will self-publish Blood Rain, leaving Sony behind to go it alone. That decision has sparked questions about whether the sequel will launch on PC and Xbox Series X and S day one alongside the inevitable PS5 version. In an interview with IGN’s Simon Cardy hot on the heels of Blood Rain’s SGF reveal in Los Angeles, Shift Up CEO and director of Stellar Blade, Hyungtae Kim, said it’s too early to make a call on launch platforms, but did tease a multiplatform approach this time.
paragraphs.cn: Shift Up已确认将自行发行《血雨》，不再与索尼合作。这一决定引发了疑问：续作是否会与PS5版同步首发PC和Xbox Series X|S版？在洛杉矶夏日游戏节《血雨》公布后不久，Shift Up CEO兼《剑星》总监金亨泰接受IGN的Simon Cardy采访时表示，现在决定首发平台还为时过早，但确实暗示了这次会采取多平台策略。

paragraphs.en: “Actually in terms of platforms, nothing has been decided yet so there's not much we can reveal,” he said. “We just want to reach out to as many fans as possible.”
paragraphs.cn: 「实际上，平台方面还没有任何决定，所以我们没什么可透露的，」他说，「我们只是想尽可能多地接触到粉丝。」

paragraphs.en: We followed up to ask if the plan was for Blood Rain, which is early in development, to launch on the current generation of consoles, now nearly six years old, or on the next generation. Hyungtae Kim replied with an interesting answer, saying Shift Up is still aiming for current-gen consoles and PCs as it has become harder to deliver significant advancement in technology amid rising costs.
paragraphs.cn: 我们接着追问，《血雨》目前处于早期开发阶段，计划是登陆已推出近六年的本世代主机，还是次世代主机？金亨泰给出了一个有趣的回答，称Shift Up仍以本世代主机和PC为目标，因为在成本上升的情况下，实现重大技术进步已变得更加困难。

paragraphs.en: “We actually see the future of computers and the consoles with a lot of issues going on,” he said. “It's becoming more and more expensive, and it's hard for it to become more improved or developed. So we definitely want to make sure that the game can be enjoyed for those who have the current PC and current consoles.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们确实看到电脑和主机的未来存在很多问题，」他说，「成本越来越高，很难再有更大的改进或发展。所以我们肯定希望确保拥有当前PC和当前主机的玩家也能享受这款游戏。」

paragraphs.en: This week, new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma said severe memory shortages fueled by the AI boom is one of the largest obstacles Microsoft’s gaming business faces. The ongoing RAM crisis leaves little room for gaming console manufacturing, with Sharma telling Bloomberg that rising RAM and storage costs are the most "uncomfortable and surprising" thing about the current state of the gaming industry.
paragraphs.cn: 本周，微软新任Xbox CEO阿莎·夏尔玛表示，AI热潮导致的严重内存短缺是微软游戏业务面临的最大障碍之一。持续的RAM危机给游戏主机生产留下的空间很小，夏尔玛告诉彭博社，RAM和存储成本上涨是当前游戏行业最「令人不安和惊讶」的事情。

paragraphs.en: "Usually what happens at this point in a generation is, your costs come down, right? Memory, storage, et cetera. Well, with AI, memory and storage costs are going up. 2.75x rather than 50% down," Sharma said. "Just in my first 100 days it's up 50%, and I think it will continue to go up."
paragraphs.cn: 「通常在这个世代节点上，成本会下降，对吧？内存、存储等等。但有了AI，内存和存储成本却在上涨。上涨了2.75倍，而不是下降50%，」夏尔玛说，「就在我上任的头100天里，成本就上涨了50%，而且我认为还会继续上涨。」

paragraphs.en: "'And so, the biggest challenge and opportunity is, how do you make affordable products during that time? And that's what the next 100 days will be about,” she continued.
paragraphs.cn: 「因此，最大的挑战和机遇是，在这段时间里如何制造出价格实惠的产品？这就是接下来100天要解决的问题，」她继续说道。

paragraphs.en: Sharma was asked gamers still care enough to pay for an expensive console. "I think it's expensive if we do not innovate," she replied. "I came to help that problem. Look, it is natural that prices go up. Every generation around us is raising prices. But I don't think you can raise prices through the hardware crisis that we're seeing. And so it will require fundamental change in terms of how we innovate and how we think about the business models and how we go bring this to market, and we're working on that."
paragraphs.cn: 当被问及玩家是否还愿意为昂贵的主机买单时，夏尔玛回答：「我认为如果我们不创新，那才是真的贵。我来就是为了解决这个问题。你看，价格上涨是自然的。我们周围的每一代产品都在涨价。但我认为你不能在当前的硬件危机中涨价。因此，这需要在创新方式、商业模式思考以及如何推向市场方面进行根本性变革，我们正在为此努力。」

paragraphs.en: With that in mind, most are bracing themselves for very expensive next-generation consoles, both from Microsoft in the form of Project Helix , and Sony in what we expect to be the PlayStation 6. In May, Sony said it had yet to decide when to launch the PS6 , nor how much it would cost, as memory shortages continue to hit hard. It’s worth noting recent reports that Sony may have to delay the release of the PS6 to 2028 or even 2029 as a result of the AI-fueled chip crisis.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到这一点，大多数人都在为非常昂贵的次世代主机做准备，无论是微软的Project Helix，还是索尼预计的PlayStation 6。今年5月，索尼表示尚未决定PS6的发布时间和售价，因为内存短缺问题持续严重。值得注意的是，近期有报道称，由于AI驱动的芯片危机，索尼可能不得不将PS6的发布推迟到2028年甚至2029年。

paragraphs.en: Ultimately, it does sound like Stellar Blade: Blood Rain will launch on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X and S, we just don’t know when exactly.
paragraphs.cn: 最终，听起来《剑星：血雨》确实会登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S，只是我们不知道具体时间。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解电子游戏行业的最新动态，这里是2026年夏日游戏节上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在X上关注他：@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
